task: OpenClaw LLM-grounded Gmail and operational status answers

requirements.requirement: Slack mentions must not become semantic request subjects
requirements.evidence: Transport normalization strips <@USER_ID> before routing, contract inference, audit, and LLM synthesis

requirements.requirement: Gmail and status adapters collect facts but an LLM writes the final contextual answer
requirements.evidence: llm_grounded_gmail and llm_grounded_status routes use deterministic evidence collection followed by Claude/Gemini/OpenAI synthesis

requirements.requirement: Verified delivery must preserve the grounded LLM answer instead of replacing it with raw EvidenceFact text
requirements.evidence: verify_delivery keeps synthesized text only after eligible non-secret evidence facts pass contract checks

requirements.requirement: Exact user Gmail wording produces a useful real answer
requirements.evidence: Local real run with Slack mention queried current Gmail and Claude returned a conclusion, categorized five messages, and stated no action was needed

requirements.requirement: Production Slack listener uses deployed change
requirements.evidence: Mac Mini paths match origin/main; production run returned the grounded Gmail answer; listener restarted running as PID 60622 with verified delivery and shadow enabled

governance_bootstrap.summary: Read completion evidence, real entrypoint verification, source-of-truth deployment, and Red Team-on-request rules.
Read Mac Mini ingress ownership, contract safety, secret handling, and commit-push-selective-deploy requirements.

verification.name: OpenClaw contract and runtime regressions
verification.target: OpenClaw run service and verification boundary
verification.command: score contract corpus; score E2E golden; run OpenClaw pytest suites
verification.result: passed: contract safety 240/240, E2E golden 10/10, targeted pytest 115 passed with one third-party deprecation warning

verification.name: Real Gmail and Claude synthesis entrypoint
verification.target: Local OpenClaw run() using real Gmail adapter and Anthropic API
verification.command: run('<@U0B2KH5RX98> 오늘 온 메일 정리해') with verified delivery enabled
verification.result: passed at 2026-07-22 20:51 KST: five current messages were categorized as marketing or alerts; conclusion and no-action recommendation were grounded; no generic abstention or raw CSS appeared

verification.name: Real status and Claude synthesis entrypoint
verification.target: Local OpenClaw run() using live status bridge probes and Anthropic API
verification.command: run('<@U0B2KH5RX98> 현재 harness-project 운영 상태를 실제 데이터 기준으로 정리해...')
verification.result: passed at 2026-07-22 20:52 KST: LLM summarized live DB, Ollama, integrity, Notion and Slack evidence, separated OpenClaw cli_missing, and included snapshot time

verification.name: Mac Mini production Gmail and listener entrypoint
verification.target: Mac Mini production OpenClaw run service and Slack listener process
verification.command: ssh macmini; run exact Slack-mentioned Gmail request; launchctl kickstart com.harness.slack-listener; inspect process flags
verification.result: passed at 2026-07-22 20:53 KST: Claude summarized five current messages with grounded categories and no-action conclusion; listener PID 60622 state=running; verified delivery and quality shadow both true

verification.name: Slack outbound DM probe
verification.result: not sent: this process could not read the approved xoxp Keychain item; no Slack message was emitted

deploy.result: passed: commit e99381c pushed to origin/main; selective backup scratch/pre_deploy_backup_20260722_205330; all five deployed path diffs were 0; backend reloaded; production Gmail run passed; Slack listener restarted PID 60622

residual_risk: A synthetic Slack DM could not be sent because the local probe process could not read the xoxp Keychain item; the Mac Mini production run and listener process were verified separately.
LLM synthesis can still vary in wording; contract safety prevents unsupported evidence sources and secret-bearing facts but is not a token-level entailment proof.
API cost logging reports a pre-existing api_cost_log.source schema mismatch while answers continue successfully.
